nasb.text: For if the word spoken through angels proved unalterable, and every transgression and disobedience received a just penalty,

esv.text: For since the message declared by angels proved to be reliable, and every transgression or disobedience received a just retribution,

cnv.text: 那透過天使所傳講的信息既然是確定的，所有干犯和不聽從的，都受了應得的報應。

ccb.text: 既然借天使传下来的话正确无误，凡干犯、违背的人都受到了应有的报应，

csbs.text: 要知道，那藉着天使所说的话既然是确定的，连一切过犯和悖逆都受到了应得的报应，
